case_study.name: the_copilot_crash
case_study.title: The Copilot Crash
case_study.subtitle: How a Microsoft AI invented a false geopolitical narrative about Tresorit – and why DNS would have prevented the crash

copilot_isolation.interpretation: Copilot shares <26% semantic basis with any other model

key_findings.falsification: DeepSeek (Chinese) works – single counterexample destroys the claim

msb_nrw_relevance.risk: Copilot produces unverified geopolitical narratives without epistemic safeguards
msb_nrw_relevance.recommendation: DNS as epistemic filter before teacher training
